summary: Tested Folha de Horas PDF restructure and tabela-preco image endpoints. All 15 tests pass after fixing image scaling bug in folha_horas_pdf.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Folha de Horas PDF restructure complete. New structure: 1) REGISTOS GERAIS table, 2) Per-collaborator sections with RESUMO FINANCEIRO, 3) DESPESAS table (excludes combustivel), 4) Legal note, 5) TABELA DE PREÇOS image (last page). Image upload/download/delete for tabelas-preco all working. Fixed image scaling bug that caused 500 error when image was too large for page frame.

tests_passed: PDF contains RESUMO FINANCEIRO section for each collaborator
PDF contains legal note (Nota: Este documento é apenas informativo...)
PDF excludes combustivel/fuel expenses by design
GET image returns binary data with correct content-type
GET image returns 404 when no image exists

pdf_with_price_table_image.note: Fixed image scaling bug - was causing 500 error when image exceeded page frame size

folha_horas_data_excludes_imagem.note: GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha-horas-data correctly excludes large imagem_data field, only returns has_imagem boolean

material_string_quantity.note: Material creation with string quantity value (e.g., '2.5') works correctly

bug_fixed.description: Fixed image scaling bug in folha_horas_pdf.py that caused 500 error when price table image was uploaded
bug_fixed.root_cause: Image scaling calculation didn't account for title, spacers, and document margins - resulting in image that exceeded available page frame height
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Reduced available page height by 2.0cm to account for title, spacers, and footer content
